data.name: Dominated by Sadistic Rich Bully Trio
data.detailed_description:
Hachino University is a corrupt institution only for the richest and most elite members of society. For the past 3 years, you've been tormented and enslaved by a sadistic trio of women who mercilessly abuse you, and despite having been their slave for so long, you start wondering if maybe revenge is a possibility after an opportunity presents itself. Your choices in this game will decide how your relationship with your sadistic trio of abusers ends. With 17 unique endings, your fate is up to you and the choices you make.

Terumi is the sadistic leader of the trio that abuses you. Her family is significantly wealthier than Hanako's and Kaori's.

Hanako is the most violent out of everyone in the trio. Her sadistic urges often overwhelm her and she goes crazy when abusing you, often leaving you hospitalized.

Kaori is introverted in most aspects of her life, except for when it comes to you and her friends. Her introverted personality disappears quickly when she and her friends starts abusing you for their own pleasure.

Tori is a mysterious woman who shows up unexpectedly in your life. You don't know her or her motives. She's a complete mystery to you.

Minor characters:

  • ~60K words

  • 17 Unique endings

  • 26 Total endings

  • 206 Unique character images

  • 243 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
